brand_assets.description: Nike - Official Online Store for Athletic Shoes, Clothing & Sports Gear. Shop the latest Nike products and enjoy free shipping.
brand_assets._fallback_note: Content sourced from Wikipedia (brand site returned sparse content)

parsed_output.target_audience: Athletes and active individuals who view sports as a proving ground for personal greatness and mental toughness, not just exercise.
taglines: Push through what holds you back
Every champion was once a contender who refused to quit
Built for athletes who train harder than they talk
parsed_output.social_post: The only opponent left is the one staring back at you. JustDoIt NikeRunning NoExcuses
parsed_output.marketing_paragraph: You don't rise to the moment. You fall to the level of your training. Every stride, every sprint, every second of doubt you push through builds the athlete you're becoming. Greatness isn't given—it's earned in the dark when no one's watching.
parsed_output.poster_prompt: Dark atmospheric scene with dramatic side lighting casting hard shadows. An athlete mid-motion frozen in determination—sweat, grit, raw focus. Bold sans-serif type overlays the image with high contrast white on black. Nike swoosh minimal but commanding in the corner.
